case_title: WALTER MOREANO VS. ALLIYAH DILLARD ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-10-2019 CONTINUED TO MAY-22-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF MOREANO, WALTER

MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-31-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST MICHELE L. SCOTT, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-31-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-23-2020. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
